column5: Selected from a short-list of top-ranked models identified during periodic review process.
column6: Cyclic Ricker model for age 4; sibling regression for age 5
column9: NONE IN THE TOP-RANKED MODELS. DFO'S Fraser Sk forecasts process includes periodic peer-review process with detailed stock-specific performance evaluation of many alternative model types. A short-list of candidate models is then identified for each stock. Annual forecasts are then selected from the short-list based on expert judgment of the context for the year (brood year conditions; cycle line patterns; environmental conditions throughout the life cycle).

column9: NEAR-SHORE SEA SURFACE TEMPERATURE AT OCEAN ENTRY. Ricker SR-model with near-shore SST at Entrance Island in spring of 2023 was selected from among the short-listed models for Quesnel. DFO'S Fraser Sk forecasts process includes periodic peer-review process with detailed stock-specific performance evaluation of many alternative model types. A short-list of candidate models is then identified for each stock. Annual forecasts are then selected from the short-list based on expert judgment of the context for the year (brood year conditions; cycle line patterns; environmental conditions throughout the life cycle).
